curation.synopsis: The super-heavy battle tank Mars Triumphant grinds across the war-torn Kalidar system, its crew waging an attritional campaign against a vast ork horde. Honoured Lieutenant Marken Cortein Lo Bannick commands the venerable machine, but he cannot outrun his own past: the old clan prejudices of his homeworld of Paragon have followed him into the regiment, and a dishonour he tried to bury threatens to undo him just as a terrifying new enemy emerges to match the Mars Triumphant gun for gun. As the crew sweats and bleeds inside their rolling fortress, Bannick learns that glory is a trap and that the only road back to honour runs through duty and self-sacrifice. A claustrophobic tank-crew war story.
